summary: Tested Stripe payment integration for guest orders. All 14 backend tests PASSED. Verified: 1) POST /api/payments/stripe/checkout/session creates checkout URL, 2) GET /api/payments/stripe/checkout/status/{session_id} returns payment status, 3) POST /api/payments/stripe/refund validates and processes refunds with 8% fee reversal, 4) Guest order payment flow creates Stripe session correctly, 5) Webhook endpoints accessible.

minor.issue: Actual Stripe refund API call is not implemented - refund record is created locally but Stripe API is not called (noted in code comments)

critical_code_review_comments: Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library with sk_test_emergent API key - working correctly in test mode
Platform fee (8%) is correctly calculated and tracked in metadata
Refund endpoint tracks fee reversal correctly (negative fee_amount in platform_fee_logs)
Note: The refund endpoint creates local records but doesn't call Stripe's actual refund API (intentional for test mode)

success_rate.frontend: Not tested - backend only per request

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test guest orders during testing (go_xxxx format)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe integration verified: 1) POST /api/payments/stripe/checkout/session creates real Stripe checkout sessions (test mode), 2) GET /api/payments/stripe/checkout/status/{session_id} returns payment status with order_id and metadata, 3) POST /api/payments/stripe/refund validates order payment status and records refund with 8% fee reversal, 4) Webhook endpoints at /api/webhook/stripe and /api/payments/stripe/webhook are accessible. Test page used: mpage_ecfa1e28feee. Stripe API key: sk_test_emergent (emergentintegrations library).

tests: Creates checkout URL for valid order
Create guest order -> Create Stripe session flow works

mocked_integrations.stripe_actual_refund_api: The POST /api/payments/stripe/refund endpoint creates local refund records but does NOT call Stripe's actual refund API - this is intentional for test mode as noted in code
